features: CLEAN & FRESH: Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Fragranced with vanilla sugar oil in a resealable bag for easy storage.

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.
SOOTHE & RELAX: Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it.
RESTFUL SLEEP: Adding epsom salts to a bath before bedtime will soothe and relax. The fresh vanilla fragrance will help aid a restful night's sleep.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, resealable bag 450g
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Fragranced with vanilla essential oil in a resealable bag for easy storage. Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins. Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it. Ready to use, fragranced with vanilla sugar oil in a resealable bag 450g. Ingredients Magnesium Sulphate, Parfum, Benzyl Benzoate, Vanilla Planifolia Fruit Oil, CI 77492 Directions Add a generous amount approximately 2 handfuls to warm, running bath water, for a wonderfully soothing & relaxing bath. Soak for at least 20 minutes to give the salts a chance to soften your skin and to be absorbed. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Do not take internally. Do not use on broken skin. Keep in a cool dry place as over time salt can attract moisture. Avoid contact with eyes. If you have epilepsy, high blood pressure or any other specific medical condition consult a doctor before use. If pregnant or breastfeeding please consult your doctor before use. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
